fields.summary: SonarQube scanner failing on Maven multi-module project
fields.description: Our Maven multi-module project started failing during SonarQube analysis after we upgraded from SonarQube 9.6 to 10.2. The scanner exits with a NullPointerException during the analysis phase. The build itself succeeds fine, only the sonar:sonar goal fails. We are running sonar-maven-plugin 3.9.1 and Java 17. The error appears consistently across all our CI pipeline runs since the upgrade.

content.text: Adding the full stack trace here. The error is: java.lang.NullPointerException at org.sonar.scanner.report.ComponentsPublisher.java:89. This started happening right after the version upgrade on Friday.
Ticket automatically assigned to SonarQube support team based on label.

Hi Priya, I can see the issue. The sonar-maven-plugin 3.9.1 is not compatible with SonarQube 10.2. You need to upgrade the plugin to 3.10.0 or above. Please update your pom.xml to use sonar-maven-plugin version 3.10.0 and retry the pipeline.
Upgraded to sonar-maven-plugin 3.10.0 and the scanner is working fine now. All modules are being analysed correctly. Closing this ticket. Thank you Rahul.
